## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Erik Kriessmann (Altimeter) and Marcel Santilli (FWD Digital) to discuss personal updates and professional ventures.](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Erik is thriving at Altimeter, enjoying the focused, high-conviction investment approach](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Marcel has successfully launched FWD Digital, an AI-powered content marketing service, reaching \~$4M ARR in less than a year](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Both see significant potential in AI-augmented services, combining scalability of software with personalized service](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [FWD Digital's success stems from efficiently delivering high-quality content marketing outcomes using AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

## Topics

### Personal Updates

  - [Both have recently embraced "settled" lifestyles:](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
      - [Erik: Married last September, new dog owner (hypoallergenic poodle)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
      - [Marcel: Married with two doodles, fully converted "dog person"](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Shared experiences of transitioning to more homebody preferences](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

### Erik's Role at Altimeter

  - [Small firm (4-person venture team) with significant capital access](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Highly selective investment approach:](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
      - [5 investments in 2023 (3 follow-ons, 2 new)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [\~60 investments over 15 years (vs. 60/year at Index)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Focus on high-conviction, deeply researched opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Flexibility in investment stage and check size](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

### Marcel's New Venture: FWD Digital

  - [Evolved from AI workflow workshops to full-service content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Rapid growth: \~$4M ARR, 30 clients, 12-month commitments](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Value proposition: Delivering content marketing outcomes efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Serves diverse clients: Public companies (Reddit), scale-ups (Ramp), AI startups (Hey Gen), e-commerce, seed-stage](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)

### FWD Digital's AI-Powered Approach

  - [200-step end-to-end content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Key components:](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [Knowledge base (using VVA, JINA)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [Research agents (Google Search API, custom u.com integration)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Planner agent (outlines, search intent analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [Content creation and adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [Post-processing (cross-linking, fact-checking, editor feedback)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Continuous improvement driven by client needs](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [$10-$15 compute cost per piece, justifiable by high-value outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### Market Opportunity in AI-Augmented Services

  - [Content marketing: $526B market, only $9B in tools](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Potential to combine scalability of software with personalized service](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Advantages over pure software (easier adoption) and traditional services (more scalable)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Applications beyond marketing (e.g., professional services, consulting)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Ideal Customers for FWD Digital

  - [Companies with confidence in their market and target persona](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Growth mindset, willing to invest in long-term organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Understanding of content marketing's compounding effects](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Less suitable: Companies focused on very targeted, high-touch enterprise sales (e.g., Palantir-style)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Erik to consider introducing FWD Digital to relevant portfolio companies (e.g., Live Kit, MISO)](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Marcel to maintain focus on content marketing while exploring potential expansions](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Both to continue monitoring AI-augmented service opportunities in their respective fields](https://fathom.video/share/SahMmNTdnnsd3XKTLpG7RjsgqAhsHwvF?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
